name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: Dallas, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns location at 59 Hillside Trace offers title loans and payday cash advances Mon-Fri 10AM-7PM, Sat 10AM-4PM.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Pawns is located at 59 Hillside Trace #101 in Dallas, GA. This standalone storefront provides quick financial services for Dallas residents who need immediate cash solutions. The store operates Monday through Friday from 10AM to 7PM and Saturday from 10AM to 4PM, making it accessible during weekend hours for Dallas visitors and locals alike.

At this Dallas location, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral, or explore payday advance options if you need quick cash before your next paycheck. The knowledgeable staff can guide you through the application process and answer questions about loan terms. To reach the Dallas storefront or schedule a consultation, call 678-363-9036.

If you're a Dallas, GA resident facing an unexpected expense or cash gap, visit TitleMax Title Pawns with a valid ID and proof of vehicle ownership (for title loans) or recent pay stubs (for payday advances). The team works quickly to get you approved and funded. TitleMax Title Pawns specializes in fast, accessible lending when traditional lenders may not.
pros: Same-day funding upon approval and in-store document signing
Online application and mobile vehicle appraisal process—start from home without dealership visit
Accepts most credit types including poor/no credit, with credit check performed but not determinative
Borrower can continue driving vehicle while loan is active
Multiple nearby Atlanta-area locations (4+ within 5 miles of Candler Road store)
Strong customer reviews (5.0/5 average, 465+ Google reviews with specific staff praise)
Hybrid model allows online application with flexible in-store completion timing
cons: APR, finance charges, and repayment terms not disclosed on website—true cost of borrowing opaque
Vehicle title surrendered as collateral; default results in vehicle loss and transportation crisis
Title pawns typically carry higher rates and fees than personal loans due to collateral-based risk pricing
No bilingual services at Candler Road location despite Atlanta's diverse population
Website does not clarify loan duration, renewal options, or rollover policies
best_for: Borrowers with vehicle collateral who need same-day emergency cash and cannot qualify for traditional loans
Atlanta-area residents seeking fast funding and willing to trade collateral risk for speed and minimal credit requirements
Vehicle owners who are confident in their ability to repay quickly and avoid default/vehicle loss
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Atlanta-area borrowers facing genuine emergencies who own vehicles outright and need same-day cash but cannot qualify for traditional loans. The critical caveat: title pawns are high-risk products where vehicle loss is the penalty for default; this should only be considered when other options are exhausted, and the website's lack of APR/fee transparency makes cost assessment impossible before applying.
services: Online title pawn application with mobile vehicle appraisal via photo submission
In-store title pawn document signing and funding
Vehicle valuation based on submitted photos
Instant loan eligibility determination and borrowing amount preview
Title pawn with competitive rates and most credit types accepted
Credit check (performed but not determinative for approval)
Multi-location servicing and partner store network access
meta_description: TitleMax Title Pawns at 59 Hillside Trace, Dallas, GA. Fast title loans and payday advances. Mon-Sat hours. Call 678-363-9036.
